channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — May 03, 2026
item.description: This is The VENCAst. A daily briefing on global affairs, European developments, and the world of technology. Today is Sunday, May 03, 2026. I am your friendly neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, and I am here to bring you the news, objectively and factually...

item.title: The VENCAst — May 02, 2026
item.description: Tensions escalate between the United States and Europe as President Trump orders troop withdrawals from Germany and imposes new tariffs on EU automotive imports. Iran proposes new peace talks with the US, leading to a drop in global oil prices, even ...

item.title: The VENCAst — April 30, 2026
item.description: Global oil prices have surged to highs not seen since 2022, driven by escalating conflict in the Middle East and critical disruptions to shipping routes. In Europe, Germany's cabinet has approved a sweeping healthcare reform package, while the Europe...
